title: Flasher deck
description: A single Flasher deck file. Lives at src/jsMain/resources/decks/<id>.json. Full authoring guide: https://github.com/breischl/flasher/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING-DECKS.md

id.description: Kebab-case identifier. MUST equal the filename stem (the app fetches decks/<id>.json), and MUST be unique across all decks. These two rules are enforced by the validateDecks build task, not by this schema.

title.description: Human-readable deck name, shown in the home list and as the deck heading.

order.description: Do NOT set this when contributing a deck. It controls the deck's position in the home list and is assigned by the maintainer at merge time.

cards.description: The cards in the deck, studied as a unit.

front.description: Prompt side. Plain text only (no HTML/Markdown is interpreted).

back.description: Answer side. Plain text only (no HTML/Markdown is interpreted).
